# Filesystem Tools

Workspace file reading, writing, editing, listing, and diffing tools.

## Toolbox
- `fs`

## Runtime
- `toolbox.py`

## Tools
- [[tool/external/fs/read_text]]
- [[tool/external/fs/write_text]]
- [[tool/external/fs/edit_text]]
- [[tool/external/fs/list_dir]]
- [[tool/external/fs/diff_text]]

## Shared Boundary
- All paths must stay inside the runtime workspace root.
- Do not escape into the project root unless the workspace maps it explicitly.
